Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Meia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Meia is a blind Consultant.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Meia believes the mission is more important than life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Meia is an individual whose mother Shera might need to kill as part of a plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Meia can lead an expedition against the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Meia is a person Shera almost got killed in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia is the oldest of the three Gardeners-in-training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia is a character who possesses alchemical glue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia was raised on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia believes in the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia is a student described as stubborn with a fragile ego.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — Meia is a character who leaps from the window and is caught by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is a Gardener and leads a team consisting of Shepherds, Masons, and herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Meia has Kameira in her blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Meia uses shears as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Meia is the daughter of Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia has alchemically strengthened hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia has eyes like a dragon's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia can rend steel with her teeth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia's eyes can blaze orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia possesses blue scales that aid in healing wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is a person who has sustained acid burns and other injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is a person who has the heart of a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Meia has short claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Meia retrieved the Heart from the crypt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Meia fought Kameira hybrid guard dogs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Meia is a member of the team that completed their first official Guild mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Meia's body is alchemically reinforced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Meia consumes potions monthly to facilitate her growth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Meia is a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Meia is part of the group that Lucan and Shera spend their time with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Meia is a deadly fighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Meia fought an Izyrian gladiator in an underground arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Meia is a fighter who uses a shear in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Shera is looking for Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Meia is someone Lucan considers when thinking through a situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Meia was supposed to lure the Champion, Urzaia Woodsman, into the arena and keep him occupied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — Meia can harden her fingernails into claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Meia possesses a Deepstrider's healing ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Meia has a Nightwyrm inside her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Meia has blue scales that gather around torn flesh at her shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia is a Consultant in the Guild of Alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia's abilities include restructuring her nails and bones via a Shadeshifter formula.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia's wounds are healed by a potion of Deepstrider blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia is immune to most poisons due to Nightwyrm venom doses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia's power contains the essence of several Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Meia possesses strength given to her as a gift by a team of skilled alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Meia is limping to shelter behind Shera and Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Meia has a blue-scaled shoulder wound that is slow to heal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Meia has enhanced power with drawbacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Meia wears black clothing and a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Meia has blond hair and orange-burning eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Shera almost attacked Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Meia woke up with her arms tied to the mast of a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Meia intends to return to the Gray Island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Meia is a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Meia has blond hair and wears tight black clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Meia is a character on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Meia is a Consultant who vanished after the survivors of The Eternal were rescued.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Meia is a Consultant whom Calder has not seen for the entire voyage to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is a Consultant with orange eyes and blond hair who can fight Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Meia's eyes blink orange for a fraction of a second.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Meia has claws that extend and retract from her nails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Meia is suspected of lying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is an injured woman with blond hair and orange eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Meia has blue scales that pop up irregularly over her skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Meia wears a black uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Meia is a person known to Calder and Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Meia is an alchemist in recovery and a Guild-mate of Lucan.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Meia is a member of Shera's team and a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Meia is a person Shera compares herself to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Meia is mentioned as someone who was not present for the conversation with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Meia is a person who approaches situations with specific plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Meia is a character whose fingers can sprout claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Meia is a Gardener who carries alchemical smoke grenades, explosive charges, and poisoned darts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — A blond Imperial Guard woman has orange and vertically slitted eyes like Meia's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Meia has surgically inserted Kameira instincts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is a person dedicated to the rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Meia is a woman with pale skin and short blond hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Meia is not a member of Calder's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Meia is a character who was on a nearby roof during the Emperor's display of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Meia stood on one side of Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Meia is a person who was missing in action.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Meia was to Shera's right during the vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Meia screamed during the vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Meia was acting feral after the Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Meia's alchemical enhancements were calling out for blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Meia warned Shera that Calder was coming for her personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Meia was the last person to kneel.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Meia is an ally of Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Meia has been appearing in Jerri's dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Meia has blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — In Jerri's dreams, Meia has orange eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Meia expresses skepticism regarding relying on the power of the Elders for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Meia is a Gardener with the Intent of a dozen Kameira inside her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Meia has become a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Meia uses orange shears that are invested to see through enemies.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Meia is an individual capable of carrying Shera's share of a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Meia resembles her mother Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Meia convinced Shera and others that Calder Marten was not directly responsible for Lucan's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Meia is a Consultant who used a circus net to cushion Shera's landing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Meia's eyes turned orange and vertically slitted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Meia has Kameira orange eyes and clawed arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera commands Meia to exit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Meia is a character who caught Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Meia has faith in the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Meia's face tightened with the effort of restraining her smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is part of the backup team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Meia is waiting among the crowd below with Shera's backup.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera intended to rejoin Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Meia is an interrogator who takes notes during questioning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Meia and the High Councilors insisted that Jyrine be interrogated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Meia tells Shera it is her duty as a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Meia is one of the Gardeners' biggest guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Meia attacks the Elder with glaring orange blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Meia emerged into the courtyard with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Meia caught Shera to prevent her from crashing into a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Meia spoke softly to General Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Meia had looked at the Regents' ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Meia is a person Shera considers wasting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Meia has the strength to fell trees with a slap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Meia is a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Meia helped Shera into the coffin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
